title: leria nervosa
intro: Leria nervosa, also known as St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant native to Europe and is widely cultivated for its medicinal properties. The plant contains bioactive compounds such as hyperforin and hypericin, which have been traditionally used to treat mild to moderate depression, anxiety, and insomnia. The health benefits of St. John's Wort include improved mood, reduced stress levels, and enhanced sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Leria nervosa typically include dried flowers, leaves, and stems, which can be made into teas, tinctures, capsules, or topical creams for various applications.
